message:
refactor(http): improve H1/H2 streaming and settings handling

HTTP/1.1 improvements (stream.rs):
- Simplify body reading state machine
- Better chunked encoding edge case handling
- Reduce allocations in hot paths

HTTP/2 improvements:
- connection.rs: Improve flow control window management,
  better WINDOW_UPDATE coalescing for efficiency
- settings.rs: Add additional settings parameters,
  improve settings frame serialization
- stream.rs: Minor state machine cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
